long_description:
# All Mobs Hate The SUN

## Description

**All Mobs Hate The Sun** is a simple but impactful mod that ensures all hostile mobs burn during the daytime. No more worrying about creepers or zombies lingering in the shadows—if it's a monster and the sun is out, it will catch fire.

### What It Does

- **Universal Sun Damage**: All hostile mobs (any entity classified as a monster) will burn when exposed to direct sunlight.
- **Increased Damage**: The sun burns more intensely than in vanilla, dealing significant damage to monsters every second they remain in daylight.
- **Consistent Behavior**: This applies to all surface-level hostile mobs, ensuring a safer overworld during the day.

This mod requires no configuration or commands—it just works automatically to make your daytime explorations safer.
name: All Mobs Hate The SUN
short_description: Makes all hostile mobs burn in daylight. The sun burns harder than usual, clearing the surface of monsters.
